hero.title: Bank Smarter. Save Faster. Invest Better.
hero.subtitle: NationalCreditUnionBank empowers individuals and businesses with seamless banking, effortless transfers, and smart investment tools.

features.title: Banking for the Future,
features.subtitle: Seamless, Secure, and Tailored to Your Needs. Experience Banking Like Never Before.

zeroFee.title: Zero-Fee Transfers
zeroFee.description: Pay your friends like you're sending them virtual hugs — no awkward IOUs needed.

smartWallet.title: Smart Global Wallet
smartWallet.description: Better than your old wallet. With 50+ currencies at 0% FX fees.

security.title: Ironclad Security
security.description: Bank-grade encryption that would make Fort Knox jealous.

accounts.label: Accounts opened globally.
accounts.description: Join the ranks of over 120,000 satisfied customers who trust NCUBank for their financial goals.

fees.label: Hidden Fees
fees.description: Nothing hidden. No hidden costs. Transparent pricing for everything we offer.

support.label: Access to funds and customer support.
support.description: Get real-time help any time. Access funds or support whenever you need it.

howItWorks.title: Bank Smarter. Save Faster. Invest Better.

step1.title: Quick Sign Up
step1.description: Create a secure account in 2 minutes, verify your identity.

step2.title: Add Funds to Your Vault
step2.description: Transfer money securely via bank transfer or credit card.

step3.title: Begin Your Savings Journey
step3.description: Set savings goals and watch your wealth grow with competitive rates.

stats.title: Banking That Works for You.
stats.subtitle: At NationalCreditUnionBank, we're not just numbers, but a story of trust, innovation, and security.

cta.title: Ready to Unlock Your Financial Potential?
cta.subtitle: Take charge of your finances with NationalCreditUnionBank today and experience a smarter, effortless way to manage your money like never before.

footer.description: NationalCreditUnionBank - Your trusted partner in modern banking. Secure, simple, and built for you.
footer.copyright: © NationalCreditUnionBank 2024. All Rights Reserved. Terms & Privacy

savings_page.title: Savings Vaults
savings_page.subtitle: Grow your wealth with smart savings goals.
savings_page.tip1: • Set up automatic transfers to your savings vault every payday
savings_page.tip2: • Round up your purchases and save the difference
savings_page.tip3: • Challenge yourself with a no-spend week each month
